seo.title: Asset History Calculator — what actually happened since 2010
seo.description: Free asset history calculator. Pick BTC, stocks, gold, or bonds; see what $100 lump sum or $100/month would have done since 2010 or 2016.

hero.headline: What actually happened?
hero.subtitle: Pick an asset, a start year, and a mode. See the real path your money would have taken — with the honest uncertainty bars on the noisy parts.

assetDescriptions.BTC: Spot Bitcoin price (USD). High volatility, no dividends. Data spliced: CoinMetrics for 2010-2014, Yahoo Finance afterwards.
assetDescriptions.SP500: S&P 500 large-cap US stocks via SPY ETF. Total-return basis includes reinvested dividends.
assetDescriptions.QQQ: NASDAQ-100 large-cap US tech via QQQ ETF. Total-return basis includes reinvested dividends.
assetDescriptions.MSCI_WORLD: MSCI World developed-markets equity via URTH ETF. Total-return basis includes reinvested dividends. Data begins January 2012 (ETF inception).
assetDescriptions.GOLD: Gold spot via GLD ETF. No yield — return is purely from price changes.
assetDescriptions.TLT: 20+ year US Treasury bonds via TLT ETF. Long duration (~17 years) makes this asset highly sensitive to interest-rate changes. Lost roughly 50% peak-to-trough during the 2022-2023 Federal Reserve rate-hike cycle.
assetDescriptions.IBOVESPA: Ibovespa, the B3 Brazilian equity index. Native total return.
assetDescriptions.DAX: DAX, the Deutsche Börse German equity index. Native total return.

output.uncertaintyMedium: Volatility means monthly entry timing materially shifts the outcome. The range above shows best vs worst timing.
output.uncertaintyLow: Bitcoin's early-decade volatility means $100/mo entries from 2010–2012 could have ended very differently depending on exact timing. We show a range, not a single number.
output.comparisonHeader: vs S&P 500 over the same window
output.btcDcaRangeNote: For BTC starting in 2010, the DCA terminal value depends heavily on the exact monthly entry path. Public calculators differ by ±50%.

resultMoment.chartAria: Total invested versus value today for {asset} since {startYear}.
resultMoment.pastPerformance: Past performance, not a forecast. This is what actually happened.
resultMoment.shareText: Based on real history, this would be worth {value} today. Past performance, not a forecast. See yours on diBoaS Money Tools.

vignette.subtitle: Past is what already happened. Future is what you decide next.
